instructions.heading: Input Validation
instructions.rule: Validate and sanitize all user input. Use Zod schemas for runtime validation. Never trust client-side validation alone. Validate on both client and server.

instructions.heading: Authentication
instructions.rule: Use JWT tokens with short expiration (15 min access, 7 day refresh). Store tokens in httpOnly cookies. Implement refresh token rotation. Never store sensitive data in JWT payload.

instructions.heading: Authorization
instructions.rule: Check permissions on every protected route. Use role-based access control (RBAC). Implement least privilege principle. Log all authorization failures for audit.

instructions.heading: Secrets Management
instructions.rule: Never commit secrets to git. Use environment variables for all secrets. Use different secrets per environment. Rotate secrets regularly. Document all required env vars in .env.example.

instructions.heading: SQL Injection Prevention
instructions.rule: Always use parameterized queries. Never concatenate user input into SQL strings. Use ORM query builders when possible. Validate all inputs even when using ORMs.

instructions.heading: XSS Prevention
instructions.rule: Sanitize all user-generated content before rendering. Use React's default escaping. Never use dangerouslySetInnerHTML without sanitization. Set Content-Security-Policy headers.
